login.title: Pocket AI
login.subtitle: Control your PC's AI agent from anywhere
login.step1: Navigate to your project folder in the desktop terminal.
login.step3_suffix: to start the daemon, and your PC will appear here.
login.e2eNotice: All communications are end-to-end encrypted with AES-256-GCM

dashboard.noSessionsHint: Run {command} in your PC terminal to connect.
dashboard.noOnlineLauncher: An online PC session is required first.
dashboard.createLaunchPending: Session created, but launch request was not delivered to your PC.
dashboard.recentPathsEmpty: No recent paths for this filter
dashboard.newSessionHint1: You can also start a session directly from your PC terminal:
dashboard.selectSessionHint: Choose a session from the list on the left
dashboard.deleteSessionConfirm: Delete this session? Chat history will also be removed.

settings.title: Settings
settings.cliTokenWarning: This token is required when running {command} in your PC terminal. Never share it with others.
settings.logoutDescription: Log out from this device. Your sessions will remain safely encrypted.

chat.keyExchange: AES-256-GCM end-to-end encryption key exchange in progress
chat.connectionLostHint: Please check your network. The secure session will be re-established automatically when connection is restored.
